{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323162231F1C5B71063ED5574DAC1"}"},"total":67},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7613260307610256152","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的文，亮点无cp ，前面可能是因为要交代系统这方面所以有点啰嗦但是过了前面三四章就流畅许多了，当美食文看也可以，日常刷也挺放松的，没有特别多的勾心斗角，就算有坏人嫉妒也会被女主挡回去或者是当日就报复回去了，挺放松的一篇文，推荐一下"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772605225,"group_id":"7559971062939667480","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"累……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N48Jg/lWrnaTj/hATungdHU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/b8efe955a7a0442e82784066848c042b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788735&x-signature=CPWOXlHFcw0jBc5gmbNTRK5H0iM%3D","user_id":"106064502444","user_name":"西儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106064502444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7559971062939667480","book_info":{"abstract":"【女频+无cp+种田+经营+美食+历史】
玩经营小游戏被系统绑定？
姜茯看着眼前的破屋和系统界面，人都傻了。
不过系统说开食肆，赚名气，只要达成成就，就送十亿奖金和回家的时空机票哎。
彼时秦始皇还在赵国为质，长平之战的硝烟还未散，六国纷乱不休。
姜茯撸起袖子就是干，先是在邯郸支起小摊，一碗豆腐脑让廉颇惊为天人；一路走来，最终踏入咸阳，她的食肆成了吕不韦宴客，蒙骜常来的去处。
在这期间，姜茯更是系统任务刷不停，名人好感度攒到手软。
不过随着食肆越开越久，姜茯突然有些慌了，她到底什么时候才能抱着十亿奖金回家啊，等等！
【闻名天下】的天下难不成是指......全世界！！！我就说这么久了声望值怎么还没满呢，原来搁着等着她呢。
就是说，我那迷人的老祖宗还正当年，正是奋斗的年纪呢，考虑考虑再发展一下事业呗。

这是经营文！经营文！经营文！重要的事情说三遍！

补充一下：全文里的一钱不等于我们现在的一块，当时的一钱差不多等于5～10元RMB这个区间。各位宝子可以不用太纠结价格这个问题哈。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/ac559741aa2dad51ad92fb76868f8c98~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"一只喵苗喵喵喵","author_id":"","book_id":"7559971062939667480","book_name":"我在战国开食肆","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0f0c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":78,"name":"美食","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=78&name=美食&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7559971067112981016","read_count":"10837","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"221628"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"105","tags":"种田,古代言情,系统,穿越,美食,无CP","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ac559741aa2dad51ad92fb76868f8c98~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779438151&x-signature=3E%2FbZUcFjQ2pfYQ5FFkzavmF2aY%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3869870206227469","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323162231F1C5B71063ED5574DAC1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点
